metadata.name: Provision Software Upgrade on Core Router

description: A core network router needs a scheduled software upgrade during a maintenance window.

nodes.task_description: Verify the current software version of the target router.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the router is running an outdated version.

nodes.task_description: Push the new software image to the router's storage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully transfers the new software file to the router.

nodes.task_description: Schedule a reboot for the router during the approved maintenance window to apply the upgrade.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the reboot for 2 AM.
